All agents have landed. The executable backlog is empty. Full-night digest:  **TL;DR:** The entire L4 list executed. Scout's 7 ranked items are done, the portfolio-wide signal drain processed roughly 800 signals across 20+ repos with honest dispositions, 15 real bugs were found and fixed with tests, and your morning MA DOR packet is ready. Around 50 commits landed across 15 nested repos. Two new items need your call (pulse KEEP/PARK, cast-voices Desktop config), and the MA DOR letter is due tomorrow.  **Status, the scout list:** 1. Cast substrate: parse gate fixed (581/581 files, was 229 false-failing for a month), 8-test regression lock, chain-audit backlog drained (80 violations cleared honestly, the rest correctly diagnosed as harvest/judgment work or library-index-owned). 2. Workflow controls: conformance tool built and wired into a production workflow, pacing playbook installed, F6 dispatch hardened. Rate-limiter control honestly held at upstream-pending, nothing mechanically blocks an unpaced new script yet. 3.
